LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF HAS TRIED TO RELY ON A DOCUMENT ATTACHED TO BE A LATE FILED DECLARATION, WHICH IS NOT PART OF THE COMPLAINT. THE COMPLAINT STILL FAILS TO PLEAD AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST SUPPORTING PARTITION IN LIGHT OF ITS EXHIBIT 1. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
